top_signals.title: Russia overspends on Putin’s war in Ukraine by $28bn
top_signals.summary: Finance ministry asked cabinet in February to freeze expenditure in other areas as cost of conflict mounts
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: How China is breaking apart a people and its culture
top_signals.summary: The campaign of repression against the Uyghurs has entered a new phase
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Japan Used Record $73.6 Billion to Support Yen in Past Month
top_signals.summary: Japan spent a record ¥11.73 trillion ($73.6 billion) over the past month to support the yen after the currency slid past 160 per dollar, according to Finance Ministry data confirming the government’s first market intervention since 2024.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: What if remote working, not AI, is to blame for weak junior hiring?
top_signals.summary: New evidence suggests the rise of working from home has made entry-level hires a less attractive proposition
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: UK Bonds Extend Monthly Rally on Receding Rate-Hike Bets
